# Archipelago Overlay

Place GeneralsAP-owned additive files here using paths relative to an Archipelago checkout.

Example:
- `vendor/archipelago/overlay/worlds/generalszh/__init__.py`
- `vendor/archipelago/overlay/worlds/generalszh/docs/setup_en.md`

Do not mirror the whole upstream tree here. Keep this directory limited to files that originate in GeneralsAP.

This README is metadata only and is intentionally excluded from the materialized vendor worktree.
